items.title: Presentation: Duolingo's Kubernetes Leap
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Duolingo's Kubernetes Leap. Franka Passing discusses the architectural shift of Duolingo’s 500+ backend services to Kubernetes.

items.title: Article: A Better Alternative to Reducing CI Regression Test Suite Sizes
items.summaryShort: Article: A Better Alternative to Reducing CI Regression Test Suite Sizes. How can you focus in a sea of results from a large regression test suite?

items.title: Podcast: Context Engineering with Adi Polak
items.summaryShort: Podcast: Context Engineering with Adi Polak. In this episode, Thomas Betts and Adi Polak talk about the need for context engineering when interacting with LLMs and designing agentic systems.

items.title: Dynamic Languages Faster and Cheaper in 13-Language Claude Code Benchmark
items.summaryShort: Dynamic Languages Faster and Cheaper in 13-Language Claude Code Benchmark. A 600-run benchmark by Ruby committer Yusuke Endoh tested Claude Code across 13 languages, implementing a simplified Git.

items.title: Java News Roundup: TornadoVM 4.0, Google ADK for Java 1.0, Grails, Tomcat, Log4j, Gradle
items.summaryShort: Java News Roundup: TornadoVM 4.0, Google ADK for Java 1.0, Grails, Tomcat, Log4j, Gradle. This week's Java roundup for March 30th, 2026, features news highlighting: the GA release of TornadoVM 4.0 and Google ADK for Java 1.0; first release

items.title: Convicted spyware maker Bryan Fleming avoids jail at sentencing
items.summaryShort: Convicted spyware maker Bryan Fleming avoids jail at sentencing. The pcTattletale founder escapes a custodial sentence following the first successful prosecution of a spyware maker in the U.S.

items.title: Spain's Xoople raises $130 million Series B to map the Earth for AI
items.summaryShort: Spain's Xoople raises $130 million Series B to map the Earth for AI. The company is also announcing a deal with L3Harris to build the sensors for Xoople's spacecraft.

items.title: The Xiaomi 17 Ultra has some impressive add-ons that make snapping photos really fun
items.summaryShort: The Xiaomi 17 Ultra has some impressive add-ons that make snapping photos really fun. The Xiaomi 17 Ultra gives you a ton of options to play around with images, including preset filters and hardware add-ons.
